transition.intent: Complete the scoped public-default security review and return to template maintenance after the validation and posture evidence gates pass.
transition.decision_rule: Route a phase-transition run to template-maintenance only after the public-default security review exit criteria and template validation command pass.

phase_model.purpose: Validate core profile and environment render paths without private cluster assumptions.
exit_criteria: render matrix covers every bundled environment preset and public profile

phase_model.purpose: Add schema validation and reviewable security baseline gates for rendered bundles.
Maintain the public Kubernetes platform template after readiness gates are complete.
blocked_work: new platform scope without an explicit phase

phase_model.purpose: Review the intentionally permissive public-default security posture without adding private image, live cluster, or rendered-bundle assumptions.
exit_criteria: public-default NetworkPolicy and Dashboard manual RBAC posture are reviewed or documented
source and rendered public matrix security baselines have no high-severity findings

required_gates.description: The template validation command must pass.
The render validation matrix must keep covering every bundled environment preset and public profile.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in schema-security-baseline and restore environment/profile matrix coverage.

required_gates.description: The rendered bundle validator must keep a repository-local schema validation path without requiring a live cluster.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in schema-security-baseline and restore kubeconform or kubectl client dry-run validation coverage.

required_gates.description: The Kubernetes security baseline must keep review gates for workload hardening and concrete secret values.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in schema-security-baseline and restore securityContext, resources, probes, NetworkPolicy, and Secret-template coverage.

required_gates.description: Rendered output, kubeconfig, and secret artifacts must remain untracked.
The public-default security review must keep an explicit next phase and transition validation command before automated transition routing resumes.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in public-default-security-review and restore a reviewable next_phase plus transition_validation_command.
